title: CHARITABLE RAFFLES, BINGO AND
doc_html:
CHAPTER 11.  CHARITABLE RAFFLES, BINGO AND

KENO LICENSING LAW

§701.  Citation

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Charitable Raffles, Bingo and Keno Licensing Law".

Acts 1999, No. 568, §3, eff. June 30, 1999.
